hvp.name: 🌈 5. Cultural diversity
hvp.intro: Erasmus+ Program Priorities (inclusion and diversity, Participation in democratic life, common values and civic engagement)
hvp.json_content:
{"media":{"disableImageZooming":false,"type":{"params":{}}},"overallFeedback":[{"from":0,"to":100}],"behaviour":{"scoringMode":"positions","applyPenalties":false,"duplicatesInterchangeable":true,"addButtonsForMovement":true,"enableRetry":true,"enableSolutionsButton":true},"l10n":{"checkAnswer":"Comprobar","submitAnswer":"Enviar","tryAgain":"Reintentar","showSolution":"Mostrar solución","up":"Arriba","down":"Abajo","disabled":"Deshabilitado"},"a11y":{"check":"Comprobar las respuestas. Las respuestas serán marcadas como correcta o incorrecta.","showSolution":"Mostrar la solución. La solución correcta será mostrada.","retry":"Reintentar el trabajo. Reiniciar todos los elementos y comenzar el trabajo de nuevo.","yourResult":"Usted obtuvo @score de un total de @total puntos","listDescription":"Lista ordenable de párrafos.","listDescriptionCheckAnswer":"Lista de párrafos con resultados.","listDescriptionShowSolution":"Lista de párrafos con soluciones.","paragraph":"Párrafo","correct":"correcto","wrong":"incorrecto","point":"@score punto","sevenOfNine":"@current de @total","currentPosition":"Posición actual en lista","instructionsSelected":"Presione la barra espaciadora para reordenar","instructionsGrabbed":"Presione las teclas de flechas arriba y abajo para cambiar posición, barra espaciadora para soltar, escape para cancelar","grabbed":"Agarrada","moved":"Movida","dropped":"Soltada","reorderCancelled":"Reordenar cancelado","finalPosition":"Posición final","nextParagraph":"Párrafo siguiente","correctParagraph":"Párrafo correcto en posición"},"taskDescription":"

Rank the answers from highest to lowest sample of intercultural skills or knowledge.

Would you be respectful of the traditions of other cultures abroad?

How would you feel in a country where you had to be very conscious of your clothing, gestures, etc. (e.g. in a country where traditional and modest dress was the custom)?

","paragraphs":["

I understand the importance of being respectful and culturally sensitive regarding my appearance and gestures. I would learn to recognise the cultural cues of my host country as quickly as I can and enjoy adapting to them as necessary.

","

I might not feel like myself at first, but I would be aware that showing respect would help me integrate into my host culture.

","

I would feel a bit uncomfortable, but I could tolerate it, especially if it was only for a short period.

","

I would feel anxious. I would only change the way I dress and behave if forced to do so.

"]}
